title: Unused scope-limited definitions should be removed
description: This rule checks for unused scope-limited definitions that could lead to unnecessary complexity and potential errors.

noncompliant.code:
def foo():
    BAR = 42
    # never used
    pass
noncompliant.description: A function defining a constant inside its scope that is never used

how_to_fix: Either remove the unused scope-limited definition or make it used.
